info.name: Mowakely API
info.description: Complete API collection for the Mowakely legal platform. Covers Auth, Profile, Cases, Offers, Payments, Categories, Admin, Superadmin, Notifications, and Health modules.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, token refresh, password management.

exec: var token = json.accessToken || json.token || json.data?.accessToken || json.data?.token;

item.name: Profile
item.description: User profile management: view and update your own profile, change password.

item.name: Cases
item.description: Case management: CRUD, search, status filters for clients and lawyers.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Legal consultation needed for business contract",
  "description": "I need a lawyer to review and draft a business partnership contract. The contract involves multiple stakeholders and requires careful legal review.",
  "category": "CATEGORY_ID",
  "city": "Cairo",
  "budget": 5000
}

item.name: Offers
item.description: Offer management: create offers on cases, update status, accept/reject.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment processing: create Stripe checkout sessions and handle webhooks.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin-only endpoints for managing users, lawyers, cases, categories. Requires admin role token.

body.raw:
{
  "full_name": "New Lawyer",
  "email": "newlawyer@example.com",
  "password": "password123",
  "phone": "+201234567892",
  "specialization": "Criminal Law",
  "years_of_experience": 5,
  "office_address": "456 Law Building, Downtown",
  "city": "Cairo",
  "bio": "Experienced criminal defense lawyer",
  "rate": 500
}

{
  "clientUserId": "{{userId}}",
  "title": "Admin-created case for client",
  "description": "This case was created by an admin on behalf of a client for legal consultation purposes.",
  "category": "CATEGORY_ID",
  "budget": 3000,
  "city": "Cairo",
  "status": "open"
}

item.name: Superadmin
item.description: Superadmin-only endpoints for full system management. Requires superadmin role token.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Superadmin created case",
  "description": "This case was created by superadmin for testing purposes with all required fields included.",
  "category": "CATEGORY_ID",
  "budget": 5000,
  "city": "Cairo",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "open"
}

item.name: Notifications
item.description: Notification endpoints for the authenticated user.
